name: Falcon-H1R 7B
archDisplay: Hybrid Transformer + Mamba-2, reasoning-tuned (SFT on long CoT + GRPO RL, DeepConf test-time scaling)
note: Reasoning-tuned hybrid model with DeepConf test-time scaling; matches models 2-7x its size.
tpsNote: Vendor reports ~1,500 tok/s per GPU at batch size 64 in a server (vLLM) setting, not a single-user RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement.

results.notes: Listed on the card as 'τ²-Bench Telecom'.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released 2026-01-05 by TII (BusinessWire/ATRC press release dated 2026-01-05; MarkTechPost/VentureBeat coverage 2026-01-07). Confirmed via HF model card + falcon-lm.github.io blog + arXiv 2601.02346 + GitHub tiiuae/Falcon-H1: exact param count 7.59B (rounds to 7.6B, config.json hidden_size=3072/44 layers/hybrid Transformer+Mamba2 confirms), max_position_embeddings=262144 confirms 256K context, license tag is Falcon-LLM/TII license (successor to the confirmed real 'TII Falcon License 2.0' used since Falcon 2). DeepConf test-time-scaling method and '2x-7x larger' comparison independently confirmed via web_search summaries of the blog/paper. All 6 result rows (AIME 88.1, MATH-500 97.4, GPQA-D 61.3, MMLU-Pro 72.1, LiveCodeBench v6 68.6, HLE 11.1) literally confirmed present on their cited sourceUrls via fetch. No changes made.
